positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully among constellations and glowing nebula dust. The fox should have clean, defined silhouettes and intricate, yet readable, markings. Incorporate deep indigo and cosmic teal colors contrasting with luminous gold and electric purple highlights. Use Art Deco geometric patterns integrated into the background and surrounding stellar formations. The overall composition must be symmetrical and centered, ideal for a high-contrast, apparel-ready graphic print. Highly detailed line art, vector style, screen print aesthetic, clean edges, symmetrical, symmetrical, symmetrical, high contrast, negative space focus.
